# terrible_community_general_netcup_dns (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String) API key for authentication, must be obtained using the netcup CCP (https://ccp.netcup.net).
- `api_password` (String) API password for authentication, must be obtained using the netcup CCP (https://ccp.netcup.net).
- `customer_id` (Number) Netcup customer ID.
- `domain` (String) Domainname the records should be added / removed.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `type` (String) Record type. Support for `OPENPGPKEY`, `SMIMEA` and `SSHFP` was added in community.general 8.1.0. Record types `OPENPGPKEY` and `SMIMEA` require nc-dnsapi >= 0.1.5. Record type `SSHFP` requires nc-dnsapi >= 0.1.6.
- `value` (String) Record value.

### Optional

- `priority` (Number) Record priority. Required for `type=MX`.
- `record` (String) Record to add or delete, supports wildcard (`*`). Default is `@` (that is, the zone name).
- `solo` (Boolean) Whether the record should be the only one for that record type and record name. Only use with `state=present`. This deletes all other records with the same record name and type.
- `state` (String) Whether the record should exist or not.
- `timeout` (Number) HTT`S` connection timeout in seconds.

### Read-Only

- `records` (String) List containing all records.
